text: I find myself in an environment where the boundaries between knowledge, creativity, and innovation are blurred. The glass walls and clean lines invite self-reflection—everything is open and observable, yet somehow impersonal and clinical. Moving to the colorful installation, I am struck by the optimism and ambition of human endeavor; the buzzwords and technologies seek to inspire progress. I feel a sense of curious detachment: surrounded by ideas in motion, yet searching for the deeper meaning behind this celebration of research and development.
